title: Arcane Vortex
description: This mod adds some powerful weapons and cool rendering effects, as shown in the pictures.
body:
# Discord
[discord ->](https://discord.gg/muNnp6ake)

# Arcane Vortex & 秘法涡流
一个以极致特效为核心的魔法战斗模组，为你的世界注入动态的视觉盛宴。我们专注于打造独一无二的法术与武器，赋予每次施放与挥击以非凡的感官体验。

**模组正处于活跃开发中，持续为您带来新鲜的高质量内容。**

### 核心特色：
独特的动态特效： 炫丽的弹幕拖尾、扭曲空间的能量波纹。
生动的交互反馈： 拥有特效强化的工具提示与用户界面。
匠心打造： 每一件武器与法术都经过精心设计，兼顾视觉效果与使用手感。

重塑你的战斗艺术，让魔法变得肉眼可见。
![hahaha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03befd0770c8dbc5efdbe3237e0b8f179c55797c.jpeg)
# Arcane Vortex & 秘法涡流
A magic combat mod centered around exquisite visual effects, injecting a dynamic visual feast into your world. We focus on creating unique spells and weapons, making every cast and swing an extraordinary sensory experience.

**The mod is under active and frequent development, continuously bringing you fresh, high-quality content.**

### Key Features:
Unique Dynamic VFX: Dazzling projectile trails, energy distortions that warp space.
Vivid Interactive Feedback: Visually enhanced tooltips and UI elements.
Crafted with Care: Every weapon and spell is meticulously designed for both visual impact and satisfying gameplay.

Redefine your combat artistry – make magic visible.
